release_notes: Major: Challenge Settings separated from User Profile — one user, many challenges
changelog: NEW: Challenges system — create and manage multiple trading challenges
NEW: Challenge switcher in sidebar — switch between challenges instantly
NEW: Profile Settings page — personal identity (name, avatar, bio)
NEW: Challenges page — add, edit, delete, switch challenges
NEW: Any prop firm — custom input, not hardcoded
NEW: Trades scoped to active challenge
NEW: Stats and alerts use active challenge settings
IMPROVED: Settings split into Profile + Challenges
IMPROVED: Sidebar shows active challenge name and balance
FIX: Current password required for password changes
Migration: Existing data auto-migrated to first challenge

db_migrations.name: create_challenges_table
db_migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS challenges (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'My Challenge', prop_firm VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT '', challenge_phase VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'Phase 1', starting_balance DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 10000, current_balance DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 10000, max_drawdown_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10, daily_loss_limit DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 500, risk_per_trade_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0.5, profit_target_pct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 8, status ENUM('active','completed','failed') DEFAULT 'active', is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INDEX idx_user_active (user_id, is_active))

db_migrations.name: add_challenge_id_to_trades
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE trades ADD COLUMN challenge_id INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER user_id

db_migrations.name: add_bio_to_users
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN bio TEXT DEFAULT NULL

db_migrations.name: migrate_user_data_to_challenges
db_migrations.sql: INSERT INTO challenges (user_id, name, prop_firm, challenge_phase, starting_balance, current_balance, max_drawdown_pct, daily_loss_limit, risk_per_trade_pct, is_active) SELECT id, CONCAT(COALESCE(prop_firm,'Challenge'), ' - ', COALESCE(challenge_phase,'Phase 1')), COALESCE(prop_firm,''), COALESCE(challenge_phase,'Phase 1'), COALESCE(starting_balance,10000), COALESCE(account_balance,10000), COALESCE(max_drawdown_pct,10), COALESCE(daily_loss_limit,500), COALESCE(risk_per_trade_pct,0.5), 1 FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM challenges)

db_migrations.name: link_existing_trades_to_challenges
db_migrations.sql: UPDATE trades t INNER JOIN challenges c ON t.user_id = c.user_id AND c.is_active = 1 SET t.challenge_id = c.id WHERE t.challenge_id IS NULL
